jsonLd.name: Keya The Urban Forest
jsonLd.description:
We take pleasure in introducing "The Urban Forest" (RERA approval No PRM/KA/RERA/1251/310/PR/200525/007759) to you.
Reasons for you to choose KEYA as a brand to buy your dream home:

All our projects are sustainable development with due care for the environment.

Completion in just 2.5 years.

We are a 100% debt-free company. We construct all our projects with self-internal funding.

Top-notch luxury finishes in the segment.

Due to faster completion, you would certainly save Rs. 20-60 lacs of interest cost on your total cost.

A quick brief about the project is provided below.

LOCATION- Sarjapur Road is where the future is taking shape. Perfectly connected to every key part of the city, itâs the pulse of the IT world and a top choice for modern homebuyers. With the upcoming metro line set to enhance connectivity even further, thereâs never been a better time to raise a toast to your dream home in this vibrant, thriving neighbourhood

DESIGN PHILOSOPHY- The project has been designed with 83% open space. We have 8.15 acres of land area with 727 luxurious 2/3/4 BHK apartments for you. We have a combination of 2/3/3 Grand/4/4 Grand BHK having an SBU of "1350/1710/1900/2400/2600" SFT.

PROJECT COMMERCIALS- All-in cost for 2/3/4 BHK starts at 1.56 cr/1.96 cr/2.75 cr+ Reg onwards. The project is approved by all major banks like SBI, HDFC, Tata Capital, Bajaj, and Axis Bank.

LOAN OPTIONS- We have exciting offers from various banks for loan processing. You have an option to take an 80% loan from SBI or 90% from HDFC/TATA Capital.

The making of "The Urban Forest

SIGNATURE LIFESTYLE "CLUB VERDE"- You would own and enjoy a dedicated 40,000 SFT âClub Verdeâ at your doorstep where sports meet leisure, pampering you with five-star amenities to make your day-to-day life dynamic yet soothing. We have 95+ lifestyle amenities at the project which would ensure that you find your interest in the project irrespective of your age.

SPORTS/FITNESS- From a dynamic futsal court and dedicated pickleball court to box cricket, volleyball, tennis, basketball, net cricket, and even a human foosball arena, weâve thoughtfully designed spaces that encourage you to step out, play, and connect.

With 6 full-fledged physical courts, along with 2 indoor badminton courts and a professional squash court, thereâs always room to pursue the sport you love. Complementing this active lifestyle are a wholesome childrenâs play park and a temperature-controlled infinity pool, creating a vibrant community where fitness, fun, and family time seamlessly blend into everyday life.

SUNLIGHT/VENTILATION/PRIVACY- We have ensured that you get direct sunlight for half of the day and daylight for the rest of the day. We have provided windows with maximum opening to ensure you enjoy fresh air and light in your home.

MATERIAL/FINISHES- We have handpicked the finishes for your home as you would have done while making your home. Rest assured to have a pleasant experience when you get to know about the ingredients of your new home.

WATER MANAGEMENT- We do understand the sensitiveness towards the rationalized use of water and recycling. We have taken a step forward in this design to make this project 100% water-neutral. You have a combination of STP/WWTP/UV/RO/RAIN WATER HARVESTING to make sure that we reuse the water to the best possible level and have minimal dependency on outside water. The project features a robust Rainwater Harvesting Tank with a capacity of 40 lakh litres, ensuring sustainable water management and conservation for the entire community.

GREEN INITIATIVES- Your homes come with fully loaded green/environment-friendly initiatives. A few of them are listed below:

250 KW of Solar Power plant for the project

ZERO water discharge project

Garbage Composting system for your waste management

Sensor-based lighting system for the common area for optimum usage

Dedicated EV car charging facility for each home

Car parking -100% covered parking for each home

ACTUAL HOME EXPERIENCE- Weâve created a detailed scale-down model of the project along with a thoughtfully designed experience centre, where you can walk through fully-furnished 2, 3 & 4 BHK mock-up homes. Itâs an immersive way to visualise the spaces and truly feel the lifestyle upgrade that awaits you here.

BOOKING AND AVAILABILITY- We have received all required statutory approvals from BBMP/RERA for the entire project. The booking is now open for A and B towers.

PROJECT COMPLETION- We are on course to complete the entire project by December 2027 and hand over your dream home to you by March-April 2028 much ahead of our committed December 2028 RERA timeline.

The offered price is fixed and is valid for a very limited period and will increase soon.

brand.name: Keya Homes
brand.description:
Our journey began in 2013 when Keya was established as a Corporate with one goal in mind: to bring nature and technology to the lifestyle of our home buyers and transform living as we know it.

Bipin Ram Agarwal, Ratan Kumar Kandoi, and Dinesh Kejriwal are the promoters and shareholders of the company. With them, they bring experience in large-scale manufacturing, consumer trade, exports, finance and business strategy.

We have remained debt-free since inception and are professionally managed. We also handover defect-free homes to all our home buyers. This means that our home buyers can place their trust in us. With Keya, your dream home is in able hands.

In our journey, we have completed 1569 homes (5 projects).

acceptedAnswer.text: Keya The Urban Forest is developed by Keya Homes. Keya Homes has successfully delivered 6 projects since 2013, including 5 projects in Bangalore.

mainEntity.name: Is Keya The Urban Forest RERA approved?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, Keya The Urban Forest is registered under RERA. The RERA number for Keya The Urban Forest is PRM/KA/RERA/1251/310/PR/200525/007759. Buyers can verify the project details using this number on the official RERA website.

acceptedAnswer.text:
The price range of apartments in Keya The Urban Forest, Kasavanahalli, Bangalore starts from ₹1.64 Cr onwards. The project offers 2 BHK, 3 BHK and 4 BHK flats, with prices approximately as follows:
  • 2 BHK: From ₹1.64 Cr
  • 3 BHK: ₹2.06 Cr to ₹2.3 Cr
  • 4 BHK: ₹2.9 Cr to ₹3.18 Cr
